untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Kalman filter predictions and measurement prediction error e(t) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal operates on a spread (EWC-EWA) with dynamic Kalman-filtered mean and deviation thresholds specified in standard deviations. Critical parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred. Substituted bb_pct_b as a proxy for mean-reversion extremes, but this does not capture the true Kalman filter logic.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading signal using Kalman filtering for adaptive mean estimation. Without access to Kalman filter predictions, measurement errors, or the actual parameter values, the translation cannot be accurate. bb_pct_b (Bollinger Band %B) approximates extreme deviations but lacks the statistical sophistication of Kalman-filtered predictions. Requires custom Kalman filter implementation outside standard indicator set.
